meta.title: Technology | Prayaan Capital
meta.description: Prayaan Capital's AI-native lending platform — smarter credit decisions, faster disbursals, and better borrower outcomes.

sections.headline: AI-Native Lending Platform
sections.subheadline: Technology built from the ground up for MSME credit in South India.

features.title: Instant Pre-screening
features.body: AI-powered eligibility assessment in under 2 minutes using business and individual data signals.

features.title: Digital KYC
features.body: Aadhaar-based eKYC and PAN verification with secure, encrypted data handling.

features.title: Alternative Data Underwriting
features.body: Bank statement analysis, GST data, and bureau signals for more accurate thin-file credit decisions.

features.title: Real-time Application Tracking
features.body: Borrowers get live status updates at every stage of the loan lifecycle.

features.title: Automated Disbursement
features.body: Straight-through processing for approved cases — no manual intervention needed.

features.title: Collections Intelligence
features.body: Predictive models identify at-risk accounts early for proactive relationship management.

bullets.title: Data Residency
bullets.body: All data stored in India on RBI-compliant cloud infrastructure.

bullets.title: Encryption
bullets.body: 256-bit SSL in transit; AES-256 at rest.

bullets.title: Access Control
bullets.body: Role-based access with full audit trail.

bullets.title: Audit & Testing
bullets.body: Quarterly penetration testing and annual IS audit.

sections.headline: Join Our Tech Team
sections.subheadline: We're building the lending infrastructure for South India's MSME economy.
